description_long: This house features a complex, multi-volume structure with three main sections, each topped with a gable roof featuring skylights and green-tinted roofing. The exterior is predominantly white, accented by black-and-white patterned wall panels and large, arched windows that provide ample natural light. The central section includes a prominent entryway with double doors, flanked by a tall, narrow window and a vertical green element resembling a modern column or decorative panel. The rear and side views reveal open balconies, rooftop terraces, and a sunroom extension, suggesting a blend of indoor and outdoor living spaces. The house is adorned with a mix of traditional and contemporary architectural elements, including symmetrical window arrangements and modern decorative motifs. Outdoor furniture, such as tables and chairs, is visible, indicating areas for social gatherings or relaxation.
description: A large, white multi-section house with gable roofs, arched windows, patterned wall panels, and a prominent central entryway. Features include skylights, balconies, a sunroom, and outdoor seating areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with double doors, a tall narrow window, and decorative green panel, flanked by two gabled sections with patterned wall panels and arched windows.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the sunroom extension, rooftop terraces, and open balconies, with visible interior furnishings and asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the rear facades of the three main sections, outdoor dining furniture, and large patterned wall panels, with symmetrical window arrangements.
description_view_3: Opposite side/rear view showing the sunroom, rooftop terraces, and additional patterned wall panels, with a focus on the house's layered structure and open spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with arched and rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central double doors with a tall narrow window, decorative green panel, and no porch or steps, flanked by patterned wall panels
